# Industry Reaction to EU AI Act Enforcement

> This simulation is currently being generated. Check back soon for real results powered by MiroFish swarm intelligence.

## Coming Soon

This demo will contain a full prediction report generated by running hundreds of AI agents in a simulated social media environment. The agents will analyze the seed material, form opinions, debate, and produce emergent predictions.

**Seed:** EU AI Act enforcement begins March 2026. High-risk AI must comply. Fines up to 35M EUR or 7% of revenue.

**Goal:** Predict how tech industry, startups, researchers, and regulators respond over 60 days
